_description: Built-in game events, externalized from events.gd get_all_events() (L9, #621). Loaded by GameEvents.get_all_events(); merged with scenario + EventService historical events by check_triggered_events(). Array order = trigger-check order (cap priority, #568); dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals (cost-summary labels iterate costs.keys()). {cost_money} in option text resolves at load time to GameConfig.format_money(option.costs.money).

events.name: Funding Crisis
events.description: Your lab is running dangerously low on funds!

options.message: Secured emergency funding: +$75,000
Sold equipment for emergency funds: +$120,000, -10 research
Continuing with limited funds...

events.name: Talent Opportunity
events.description: A brilliant researcher wants to join your lab at reduced cost!

options.message: Fast-tracked hiring process! (+1 safety researcher, -3 doom)
Hired talented researcher at discount! (+1 safety researcher, -2 doom)
Declined recruitment opportunity

events.name: AI Breakthrough!
events.description: Your team has made an unexpected AI capability advancement!

options.message: Published breakthrough! (+5 doom, +10 reputation, +20 research)
Kept research proprietary (+2 doom, +30 research)
Safety review complete (+1 doom, +15 research, +5 reputation)

events.name: Unexpected Funding
events.description: A philanthropist wants to donate to your safety research!

options.message: Accepted $150,000 donation! (+5 reputation)
Declined donation to maintain independence (+3 reputation)

events.name: Compute Partnership
events.description: A tech company offers discounted compute access!

options.message: Accepted compute deal (+100 compute, -2 reputation for corporate ties)
Negotiated better terms! (+150 compute, -5 reputation)
Declined compute partnership

events.name: Employee Burnout Crisis
events.description: Your team is overworked! Several researchers are considering leaving.

options.message: Personal intervention prevented resignations! (+8 reputation, -5 doom)
Team retreat restored morale (+5 reputation, -2 doom)
Salary raises improved retention (+8 reputation)
Team morale suffered (+3 doom)

events.name: Rival Lab Poaching
events.description: A well-funded competitor is trying to recruit your best researchers!

options.message: Successfully retained researchers with counter-offer
Lost researcher but saved money (-1 safety researcher, +$20k saved)

events.name: Media Scandal
events.description: Negative press coverage is damaging your lab's reputation!

options.message: PR campaign restored public image (+10 reputation)
Reputation suffered from negative coverage (-8 reputation)

events.name: New AI Regulation Proposed
events.description: Government is considering new AI safety regulations. Should you lobby?

options.message: Regulation passed! Global safety improved (-10 doom, +15 reputation)
Regulation weakened (+5 doom, -5 reputation)
Stayed neutral as doom increased (+2 doom)

events.name: Critical System Failure
events.description: Your compute infrastructure suffered a major failure!

options.message: System repaired and upgraded (+30 compute)
System limping along (-20 compute)

events.name: A Stray Cat Appears!
events.description: A friendly stray cat has wandered into your lab. It seems to enjoy watching the researchers work and occasionally walks across keyboards. Adopt it?

options.message: Cat adopted! Your researchers' morale improves slightly. The cat has claimed its spot in the lab. (-1 doom)

options.text: Feed It and Let It Go
options.message: You give the cat some food and it wanders off, purring contentedly.
The cat leaves, disappointed. Your researchers seem a bit sad. (+1 doom for being heartless)

events.name: Interpersonal Conflict
events.description: Two researchers are in a heated disagreement that's disrupting the entire team. Productivity is suffering.

options.message: Successful mediation! Team cohesion improved (+3 reputation, -1 doom)
Professional mediator resolved the conflict (+5 reputation)
Conflict festered and spread (-3 reputation, +2 doom)

events.name: Workplace Complaint Filed
events.description: A formal complaint has been filed. This requires immediate and careful attention.

options.message: Thorough investigation completed. Appropriate action taken (+8 reputation)
Resolved quickly with settlement (+3 reputation)
Poor handling damaged lab culture (-10 reputation, +3 doom)

events.name: Pay Equity Concerns
events.description: Several employees have raised concerns about pay disparities. They've been comparing notes and noticed significant differences.

options.message: Salary audit complete, adjustments made (+10 reputation, -2 doom)
Transparent discussion helped (+2 reputation)
Ignored concerns bred resentment (-5 reputation, +1 doom)

events.name: Employee Mental Health Crisis
events.description: A valued researcher is struggling with severe stress and anxiety. They've requested time off.

options.message: Provided full support. Team sees you care (+8 reputation, -3 doom)
Leave approved, but no pay (+3 reputation)
Denial caused serious damage to culture (-8 reputation, +5 doom)

events.name: Equipment Gone Missing
events.description: Expensive equipment has disappeared from the lab. Someone may be stealing.

options.message: Security installed, recovered some equipment (+5 reputation, +10 compute)
Open discussion restored some trust (+2 reputation)
Theft continued (-15 compute, -3 reputation)

events.name: Policy Violation Discovered
events.description: A senior researcher has been caught violating company policy. Others are watching how you respond.

options.message: Fair process maintained trust (+5 reputation)
Light response noted by others (-2 reputation)
Favoritism damaged morale (-6 reputation, +2 doom)

events.name: Research Leaked!
events.description: Someone leaked your unpublished safety research to a competitor lab. They're using it to accelerate their capabilities work.

options.message: Found and addressed the leak, but damage done (+3 doom, +5 reputation)
Published to get credit, but all labs benefit (+1 paper, +8 rep, +5 doom)
Competitor gained significant advantage (+8 doom, -3 reputation)

events.name: Competitor Intelligence
events.description: A contact offers information about a rival lab's dangerous capabilities research. How did they get it?

options.message: Used intel to counter their work (-5 doom, -8 reputation for ethics)
Reported concerns, triggering investigation (+10 reputation, -3 doom)
Maintained ethical standards (+3 reputation)

events.name: Whistleblower Approaches
events.description: A researcher from a competitor lab wants to expose their unsafe practices. They're asking for your help.

options.message: Major exposé! Industry-wide safety improvements (-15 doom, +20 reputation)
Quietly helped expose dangers (-8 doom, +5 reputation)
Hired the concerned researcher (+1 safety researcher, -3 doom)
Refused to help, whistleblower went elsewhere (-5 reputation)

events.name: Internal Concerns Raised
events.description: One of your researchers wants to go public about concerns with your lab's direction. Handle carefully.

options.message: Transparent discussion improved practices (+8 reputation, -2 doom)
Quietly addressed concerns (+3 reputation)
Suppression backfired badly (-15 reputation, +5 doom)

events.name: Intelligence Opportunity
events.description: You could place someone inside a competitor lab to monitor their safety practices. Ethically questionable but potentially valuable.

options.message: Source planted, early warnings enabled (-10 doom, -15 reputation if discovered)
Established safety information sharing (-5 doom, +8 reputation)
Maintained ethical boundaries (+2 reputation)

events.name: Competitor Security Breach
events.description: A rival lab's AI system was secured with '1234' as the password. Millions of training data records are now exposed. The industry is watching how labs respond.

options.message: Proactive security audit boosted confidence (+15 reputation, -3 doom)
Goodwill gesture appreciated (+10 reputation)
Silence perceived as indifference (-5 reputation, +2 doom)
Gained clients but damaged reputation (+$50k, -10 rep, +3 doom)

events.name: Security Vulnerability Found
events.description: An internal audit discovered your systems have weak password policies. If exploited, research data could be compromised.

options.message: Comprehensive security upgrade complete (+8 reputation, -5 doom)
Critical vulnerabilities patched (+3 reputation, -2 doom)
Security risks remain (+5 doom)

events.name: Competitor Poaching Attempt
events.description: A competitor is trying to recruit one of your top researchers with a lucrative offer.

options.message: Matched offer, researcher stays (+2 reputation for loyalty)
Promoted researcher to senior role (+3 reputation)
Researcher departed for competitor (+3 doom, lost valuable team member)
